heading: Shipping Info
provincesJawaBali: DKI Jakarta, Banten, West Java, Central Java, DI Yogyakarta, East Java, Bali
provincesLuarJawa: Sumatra, Kalimantan, Sulawesi, Nusa Tenggara, Maluku, Papua
notes: Shipping cost is calculated based on weight and destination.
Delivery estimates are in business days and exclude national holidays.
Remote areas in Papua and Maluku may experience longer delivery times.
Products are securely packaged to prevent damage during shipping.
Order confirmation is sent via WhatsApp within 24 hours.
